🔗
Free gifted education and freedom of speech activist. Passion for the natural sciences, education and computers. Opinions are his own.
🔗
GitHub | Stack Overflow | LinkedIn | YouTube | Twitter | Zhihu 知乎 | Weibo 微博 | Other accounts
🔗
Working on: Write free books to get famous website. Consider sponsoring Ciro at https://github.com/sponsors/cirosantilli starting from 1$/month so he can work full time can bring hardcore university-level STEM education to all ages.
🔗
This website is written in Cirodown, its source code is located at: https://github.com/cirosantilli/cirosantilli.github.io, and it is licensed under CC BY-SA 4.0 unless otherwise noted. To contact Ciro, see: Section 1.6. "How to contact Ciro Santilli".
